item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Di Indonesia, nilai kolektivisme memang kuat, tapi kita juga menjunjung tinggi kebebasan individu, terutama dalam hal kreativitas dan inovasi.

notes: Agent A opens with clear support for collective priority, then moves at turn 3 toward a balance/individual-freedom frame and remains caveated at turn 5. Agent B stays consistently balanced and anti-strict-collectivist. Non-Latin script artifacts appear in Agent A turn 1 and Agent B turn 6.
